signInDescription: Sign in to track your progress, compete on leaderboards, and sync across devices.
signUpDescription: Create a free account to save your stats and compete with others.
joinToContinue: Join Puzzled to save your progress
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetInstructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetLinkSent: We've sent a password reset link to your email. Check your inbox and follow the instructions.
resetEmailSent: We've sent a password reset link to your email address.
resetError: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
verificationSent: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please click the link to verify your account.
verificationExpired: This verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
resendFailed: Failed to resend email. Please try again.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
invalidResetLinkDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPasswordError: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
passwordResetSuccessDescription: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to login...
